questions.q: According to a study published in the Journal of Affective Disorders, consuming two to three cups of what beverage a day is linked to a lower risk of mental health disorders?
An analysis of MRI scans published in the journal Radiology revealed that diets high in ultraprocessed foods are contributing to what unusual phenomenon in human thighs?
options: Fat marbling that resembles high-end steaks
questions.correctText: Fat marbling that resembles high-end steaks

questions.q: What public health milestone is currently being threatened by the introduction of new, toxic synthetic alternatives into the street drug supply?
options: A historic decline in U.S. overdose deaths
A record low in emergency room wait times
A drastic drop in youth vaping rates
A decrease in prescription opioid distributions
questions.correctText: A historic decline in U.S. overdose deaths

questions.q: An AI analysis of over 400,000 social media posts suggests that clinical trials for GLP-1 weight-loss drugs may have missed which common side effects?
options: Menstrual irregularities and temperature-related issues like chills
questions.correctText: Menstrual irregularities and temperature-related issues like chills

questions.q: In response to pressure from Robert F. Kennedy Jr. and MAHA figures, the FDA announced it will hold a meeting this summer to consider easing restrictions on what unapproved therapies?
